hero.title: Urban Gastronomy Nexus
hero.subtitle: School and educational kitchen in the United Kingdom — fluid boundary optimization, custom shop drawings, and food-grade fabrication.
hero.imageAlt: School commercial kitchen — United Kingdom, primary project view

about.title: Fluid boundary optimization
about.lede: The Urban Gastronomy Nexus concept anchors a high-efficiency production core in a master-planned setting. The design links indoor culinary precision with outdoor guest service, giving training and production a single coordinated landscape.

blocks.title: Integrated zones and flow
blocks.body: The layout combines a main kitchen with a dual-prep island and a high-capacity hot line, a segregated washing area, management office, and a secondary outdoor area. The ground floor is tuned for the transition from preparation to service with consistent technical rigor.

blocks.title: Stainless Steel 304 — food grade
blocks.body: Custom units use Stainless Steel 304 (non-magnetic, food grade) for UK health and safety and long-term durability. Highlights include a three-burner Chinese range with 225 mm burners, a heated gantry with hot case, trash-hole table with integrated gantry, double and single sink tables with 2 mm tops (14 swg) and 450×450×300 mm bowls, and an exhaust hood with grease filters, ducting, and blower.

blocks.title: Segregated washing
blocks.body: The fluid boundary layout uses a physical separation so washing stays apart from raw prep and dirty dish paths never cross clean routes — the core of a HACCP-aligned story for UK audits.

blocks.title: Legwork and extraction
blocks.body: Legs use 38×38 mm square pipe (16 swg) with underneath bracing to eliminate wobble under heavy machines. Extraction bodies at 1.5 mm integrate grease filtration and blower for stable air quality.

blocks.title: Contractor reference
blocks.body: Worktops: 2 mm (14 swg), SS 304 non-magnetic. Legs and bracing: 1.5 mm (16 swg), 38×38 mm square pipe. Extraction: 1.5 mm body with integrated grease filter and blower.

gallery.title: Drawings and visuals
gallery.subtitle: Images are listed from Vercel Blob under this project folder. Use main/main.webp (or .jpg) for the hero and card.

callout.title: Planning a UK education or hospitality kitchen?
callout.body: We pair HACCP-aware zoning with fabrication-grade documentation so installers and inspectors see the same story.
